text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: This was a good victory. I have no complaints.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
As the Empress, my wish is to always strive for this
standard.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
As the Empress, my wish is to always strive for this
standard.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Calm down. It was a single victory. I still have
much to achieve.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: We need to maintain our focus for the next race.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...I'm not saying you can't be pleased. Just don't
go overboard.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'm aware of my status as Empress. The word "lax"
is not in my dictionary.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hmph. Even I'm allowed to smile after a victory.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Grah! Stop smirking! Stop it now!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You warn me about being lax, but you're the most
laid-back person here!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Very well—I'll whip you back into shape!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I endure another one of Air Groove's lectures, but
she seems cheerful even as she tells me off.
